title: Phase 346: Authoring Flow Proof And Docs Handoff

title: Phase 345: Wire Selection And Slicing

title: Phase 343: Insert Node Into Wire

notes:

Implementation started in main worktree because 339.1 is the blocking runtime/query contract for downstream UI and support beads. Scope remains AsterGraph.Editor runtime DTO/query/diagnostics plus focused Editor tests.
close_reason: Implemented canonical graph validation snapshot/readiness query. Added GraphEditorValidationSnapshot/Issue DTOs, IGraphEditorQueries.GetValidationSnapshot(), inspection snapshot projection, query feature descriptor, public API inventory/baseline, and focused Editor tests. Verification: focused validation/contracts query tests passed; dotnet build AsterGraph.sln -c Release passed; public API validation passed; AsterGraph.Editor.Tests Release --no-build passed.

title: 338.3 Disabled reason and status projection
description: Ensure selection-aware commands expose disabled reasons or status text instead of failing silently, reusing existing command state paths.
acceptance_criteria: UX_COMMAND_DISABLED_REASON_OK is covered by focused tests; no broad compatibility or fallback layer is introduced.
notes:
Responsibility: disabled reason/status state only. Change scope: command state/descriptor/menu projection and tests. Verification: focused command state tests.
Parallel read-only mapping assigned. Implementation will be serialized if shared command/session files overlap; use Dolt/git worktree only for disjoint follow-up docs/proof work.
Implemented disabled reason/status projection through the existing descriptor route. Disabled descriptor-backed commands now return false and project their reason to status; retained descriptor overrides preserve kernel disabled reasons; hosted authoring tool buttons show disabled reason tooltips. No broad fallback layer was introduced.
Verification: GraphEditorKernelCommandRouterTests cover disabled execution/status; GraphEditorSessionTests cover retained reason preservation and menu signatures; GraphEditorViewTests cover toolbar/palette tooltips. Focused and full Release test runs passed.
close_reason: UX_COMMAND_DISABLED_REASON_OK covered by descriptor/status/menu/view tests.
